headlines.headline: Frelis Genomics misses quarterly revenue estimates by 18%

sentiment.reasoning: An 18% revenue miss is a significant negative indicator of current operational performance and market demand.

headlines.headline: Xelvol Biotech withdraws from Europe market citing unfavorable conditions

headlines.headline: Grevel Diagnostics announces breakthrough in cloud infrastructure

sentiment.reasoning: A breakthrough in cloud infrastructure suggests potential for improved operational efficiency or new product capabilities, though the financial impact is not yet quantified.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
